title: Acerca de Elite Mexico - Elite Mexico
content:
Elite Mexico is a world leading developer and manufacturer of specialty products for engineered high performance surfaces and flooring.
Our brand is driven to provide solutions and performance for architects and property owners. Building on innovative, market-leading cementitious and resinous technology, the company manufactures high performance specialty flooring surfaces and finishes for a multitude of uses. The brand is communicated through thousands of architects, interior designers and professional installers who depend on our products.
Decades of innovation has led to a range of market-leading products and systems including performance flooring solutions, restoration systems and decorative finishes. We continue to formulate new products to achieve superior quality and genuine innovation that delivers the unexpected. Today, we are a global icon offering products, systems and solutions around the world.
Our Method
RESEARCH
New flooring ideas enter our world of cementitious and resinous material every day. We take pride in our meticulous approach to flooring and client research to ensure we’ve covered all ground before prototyping.
TESTING
Our team of chemists are continually developing and testing innovative and environmentally friendly products for the specialty fluid-applied resinous, cementitious flooring and surfaces industries. We do not only test our products internally, we rely heavily on reputable outside testing facilities providing their performance results as proof of validity and non-exaggerated data.
PRODUCTION
We match precise engineering with premium raw materials and performance additives in a controlled environment to ensure consistency and quality.
